data.title: Tropical Storm Bertha underscores the rising focus on disaster resilience in national construction.
data.description: In the latest update, it was reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 200 million. The global death toll due to the virus has now reached over 4.2 million. The United States continues to be the country with the highest number of cases, with over 35 million infections and more than 612,000 deaths. In terms of vaccine distribution, approximately 4.5 billion doses have been administered worldwide. Despite vaccination efforts, concerns about new variants and breakthrough infections persist. Governments are emphasizing the importance of following safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Norway’s health system adopts Wolters Kluwer UpToDate Enterprise Edition
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Wolters Kluwer Health has revealed that Norway's health system has opted to continue using UpToDate Enterprise Edition, a prominent Clinical Decision Support (CDS) tool. The system spans across more than 50 public hospitals and 11,000 beds within 20 trusts nationwide. This decision marks an extension of a 15-year collaboration with Helsebiblioteket, currently under the Norwegian Institute of Public Health (NIPH). The tool aids clinicians across the nation, with Kjell Tjensvoll from Team Le as a key contact.

data.title: QumulusAI Signs $32 Million, Two-Year NVIDIA Blackwell B300 Agreement With AI Inference Platform Provider
data.description: Atlanta-based QumulusAI, traded on Nasdaq under QMLS, has disclosed a significant business deal totaling over $32 million. The company has secured a two-year contract to provide NVIDIA Blackwell B300 capacity to an AI inference platform specialist concentrating on generative AI applications. The agreement also includes renewal possibilities, and the allocated capacity is anticipated to be operational by the autumn of 2026. The client's platform emphasizes the provision of rapid and expandable infrastructure tailored for generative AI purposes.

data.title: PitchBook and Madrona to Talk AI and Capital Concentration at Seattle Tech Week
data.description: In Seattle, PitchBook, a prominent private capital market intelligence platform, revealed plans to co-host a live recording of Madrona’s Founded & Funded podcast during the upcoming fourth annual Seattle Tech Week. The discussion will showcase PitchBook's Executive Vice President of Research & Market Intelligence Nizar Tarhuni alongside Madrona Partner Sabrina Albert. This event highlights the collaboration between the two local institutions and emphasizes the region’s ongoing success in the tech industry.

data.title: Cognitive Credit Launches Claude Connector to Power Enterprise AI in Institutional Credit Research
data.description: The Claude Connector has been recently introduced by Cognitive Credit in New York, providing direct access to the company's data within Claude. This new development aims to streamline access to Cognitive Credit's data, enhancing efficiency for users.

data.title: HealthStream to Host Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Nashville-based HealthStream, a Nasdaq-listed healthcare technology firm specializing in clinical workforce solutions, is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026 which concluded on June 30, 2026. The company will unveil its financial results post-market close on Monday, August 3, 2026. Participants and investors can gain insights into HealthStream's Q2 numbers during the scheduled event.

data.title: Real Messenger Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Letter Regarding Minimum Price Deficiency
data.description: Real Messenger Corporation, a chat-based real estate platform traded on Nasdaq under RMSG, received notification from Nasdaq on July 22, 2026, for not meeting the minimum closing bid price requirement of $1 per share for its class A ordinary shares. This deficiency persisted for 30 consecutive business days from June 8, 2026, to July 21, 2026. The Nasdaq Letter serves as a notice of non-compliance and does not lead to immediate delisting nor impacts the trading of the Company’s shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market presently.

data.title: Leon Financial Network Announces Strategic Partnership with Tocqueville Asset Management
data.description: Leon Financial Network, a branch of Leon Capital Group, a diverse company with operations in real estate, healthcare, and financial services, revealed plans to offer growth funding to Tocqueville Asset Management, an independent RIA in New York City managing $10.2 billion. The infusion of capital from Leon Financial Network, alongside their value-enhancing expertise, aims to support Tocqueville in creating enduring enterprise value.

data.title: Real Estate Split Corp. Class A Distribution
data.description: In Toronto on July 23, 2026, Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS) disclosed that a distribution for July 2026 is set to be paid out to Class A shareholders. The Fund highlighted the specific payment details for these shareholders.

data.title: SINTX Technologies Engages Veteran MedTech Executive Chris Lyons and Southern Metrics to Establish Strategic Opportunity Management Program
data.description: SINTX Technologies, Inc., a prominent figure in advanced biomaterials and silicon nitride technologies for medical and industrial use, revealed its collaboration with Southern Metrics Consulting in Salt Lake City, Utah on July 23, 2026. The aim of this engagement is to identify, assess, and pursue strategic prospects that are geared towards improving stockholder value. Southern Metrics, spearheaded by Chief Executive Officer Chris Lyons, a seasoned medical technology executive and strategic advisor who has been a part of the SINTX Board of Directors since April 2025, will take charge of establishing and supervising the Company's recently formed Strategic Opportunity Management Program. This move is expected to enhance the Company’s value proposition and bolster its position in the market.

data.title: BOS Secures $990,000 Order from a U.S. Customer
data.description: In Rishon Le Zion, Israel, on July 23, 2026, BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. revealed that its Supply Chain Division successfully landed a purchase order worth $990,000 from a current customer based in the United States. BOS is recognized for integrating supply chain technologies across various industries including aerospace, defense, industrial, and retail sectors. The company operates under the ticker symbol BOSC on the NASDAQ stock exchange.
